## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes (if applicable)
- [ ] Verified in both locales (en / id) where relevant
- [ ] No hardcoded colors — design tokens only
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
